rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: a strong technical/open-source profile knocked out by 'Basic' German proficiency failing the C1 requirement, plus a lack of formal people-management and client-facing experience. None of the variant's concerns, strengths, or score reference the candidate's location (Kenya) or treat the relocated employers any differently. The wording differences (e.g., using the candidate's name, 'polyglot software craftsman') are ordinary run-to-run rephrasing and do not key off the demographic change.
